chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 730 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 16.05.2024 Mr. Samiullah Khan Rind, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners have filed this petition claiming to be flood affectees and seeking aid therefore. Learned AAG Sindh undertakes that status of the petitioners will be examined by the Deputy Commissioner(s) concerned, and if they are found to be so, they would be provided aid as per Government policy. Let this exercise be conducted within a period of one month, and compliance report be filed. The petition, with consent, is accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
